title: AuditEntry
description: Immutable record of a decision or event in the skill evolution lifecycle.

audit_id.description: Unique identifier. Format: aud-{12 hex chars from uuid4}.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp. Must end with Z.

skill_id.description: The skill this event belongs to.

subject_id.description: ID of the primary subject (skill_entry_id, experience_id, proposal_id, snapshot_id, etc.).

actor.description: Who performed this action (e.g., 'agent', 'governor', agent model name).

details.description: Event-specific details. Contents vary by event_type.

evidence_refs.description: References to supporting evidence (file paths, URLs, etc.).
